abort.no_compatible_transmitters: No compatible radio frequency transmitter is available for this integration.

error.invalid_housecode: Housecode must be a letter from A to P.
error.no_response: No response detected. Put the device in pairing mode again and retry.

pairing_mode.description: Bring device into learn mode, then press Ok.
pairing_mode.title: Pair device

data_description.device_responded: Select Yes if the target device reacted to the learn command.

pairing_result.description: Select Yes to continue setup. Select No to return to learn mode and resend the learn command.
pairing_result.title: Confirm pairing

data_description.housecode: The housecode letter from A to P.

user.description: Choose the transmitter and configure your device settings.
